steps.t: The foetid fountain pools are located near Bazanmanar. Golodhril has asked you to bring her samples of the plants from the foetid pools.
Golodhril is located in Bazanmanar. You should bring the plant samples to Golodhril.
Kurdushâlak runs the length of Clovengap. Golodhril has asked you to collect clay from the banks of Kurdushâlak.
Golodhril is located in Bazanmanar. You should bring the clay to Golodhril.
Golodhril's workbench is located in Bazanmanar. You should mix the clay with the ingredients in the mortar on Golodhril's workbench.
The foetid pools are located near Bazanmanar. Golodhril has asked you to add drops of the antidote to the foetid pools.
Golodhril is located in Bazanmanar. You should give Golodhril the good news.
